_publications._publicationTitle: Establishment of immortalized murine mesothelial cells and a novel mesothelioma cell line.

_contextSnippet: Of note, primary mesothelial cells (initial density, 1500 cells/cm^2) from Nf2+/− mice showed slightly enhanced proliferation compared to the cell lines generated from WT mice
details: Primary mesothelial cells from Nf2+/− mice showed slightly enhanced proliferation compared to WT mice
